name: Brookdale Senior Living Inc.
summary: PART I Unless otherwise specified, references to "Brookdale," "we," "us," "our," or "the Company" in this Annual Report on Form 10-K mean Brookdale Senior Living Inc. together with its consolidated subsidiaries. Our Business We are the nation's premier operator of senior living communities, operating and managing 584 communities in 41 states as of December31, 2025, with the ability to serve approximately 51,000 residents.
